entries.notes: 2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. MMT has a stake in whether public spending, transfers, and labour-market institutions are constrained by real resources rather than household-budget analogies.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Market socialism has a stake in whether worker voice, public investment, and socialized-capital mechanisms can coexist with productive allocation.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Degrowth has a stake in whether welfare, emissions, and labour-security outcomes can improve without treating GDP growth as the sole objective.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Eco-socialism has a stake in whether public ownership, green investment, and labour-protective institutions outperform market-only climate and welfare mechanisms.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Marxian theory has a stake in whether capital mobility, financial liberalisation, and labour bargaining dynamics shape observed distributional outcomes.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Marxist-Leninist theory has a stake in whether state direction, industrial policy, and decommodified welfare can outperform market allocation.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Democratic socialism has a stake in whether democratic public provision, worker power, and redistribution improve social outcomes without destroying employment.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. Post-Keynesian theory has a stake in demand-led growth, wage-led regimes, financial instability, and fiscal-transfer effectiveness.

2026-05-04 V1 balance-floor coverage wave; curated mechanism-family selection from already tested hypotheses, independent of observed score effects. Mechanism family: redistribution_support. New Keynesian theory has a stake in state-contingent fiscal, labour-market, and market-failure mechanisms rather than unconditional laissez-faire claims.

methodology_gate.mixed_policy: School predictions are marked mixed when the theory has a conditional stake but not a clean directional commitment.
methodology_gate.not_selected_by: observed verdicts or school score effect
methodology_gate.selection_rule: Curated tested hypotheses from declared mechanism families; links stop when each target school reaches 100 unique linked hypotheses.
methodology_gate.verdict_policy: No verdicts changed; only reciprocal position links and covers_claims were added.
